# <a id="_heading=h.2et92p0"></a><a id="_heading=h.tyjcwt"></a>

# <a id="_Toc207966444"></a>__2 Project Definition__

## <a id="_Toc207966445"></a>__2\.01 Executive Summary__

Pivot Interiors requires a unified platform to replace their current fragmented system landscape consisting of Adobe Workfront, D365, Power BI, and FluidPay for managing pre\-quote activities\. The company processes complex design and labor quote requests across multiple market segments \(Enterprise, Venture, Public Health Care, Government\) with sophisticated workflows that currently require extensive manual coordination between systems\.

Orion/NetSuite provides an integrated solution that directly addresses Pivot's pre\-quote process requirements through standard request management, design workflow automation, resource capacity reporting and financial integration capabilities\. The solution eliminates manual data re\-entry between systems while maintaining the sophisticated business logic and approval workflows that Pivot has developed over several years of operations\.

## <a id="_Toc207966446"></a>__2\.02 Company Overview__

Pivot Interiors, Inc\. comprises a distinguished team of innovators, creators, and thought leaders dedicated to crafting exceptional interior solutions for businesses of all sizes\. Our designs not only embody your brand but also inspire employees to thrive, create, and collaborate in the workplace\. California\-born and raised, we are proudly headquartered in the Bay Area, serving clients state\-wide\. With offices and Design Centers in Santa Clara, Fremont, San Francisco, Costa Mesa, Los Angeles, and La Mirada, we invite you to explore our spaces and experience the Pivot Interiors difference\. Pivot Interiors is a MillerKnoll Certified Dealer\.

[__https://www\.pivotinteriors\.com__](https://www.pivotinteriors.com/)

## <a id="_Toc207966447"></a>__2\.03 Orion/NetSuite Overview__

Orion/NetSuite provides a comprehensive pre\-quote management solution designed to eliminate the manual processes and system disconnects that create operational inefficiencies in project\-based businesses\. The envisioned solution includes an integrated request engine with configurable request types, conditional field visibility, and automated routing capabilities that ensure requests reach appropriate resources without manual intervention\.

The resource management capabilities within Orion/NetSuite enable automated assignment workflows with real\-time capacity tracking, eliminating the manual coordination currently required between users\. Built\-in utilization reporting provides visibility into resource allocation against established targets, while integrated time tracking captures both billable and non\-billable hours for accurate project profitability analysis\. The solution's project management functionality seamlessly connects pre\-quote activities to downstream order processing and fulfillment workflows\.

## <a id="_Toc207966448"></a>__2\.04 Project Overview__

Pivot’s current engagement with GSI is based around the creation and implementation of a set of business requirements appropriate to its business operations both today and scaling into the future\. This project primarily consists of the following stages:

- __D__iscover: Evaluate the dealer’s business processes with Orion/NetSuite capabilities
- __R__ealize: Perform initial setup, installation and configuration of your NetSuite instance
- __E__ducate: Empower your team for success through comprehensive training and user adoption support
- __A__ctualize: Bring your NetSuite and Orion solution to life with seamless data migration and go\-live support
- __M__aximize: Support and expand your operations with dedicated ongoing assistance and strategic customizations\.

Our implementation approach is “Align, Adapt, Accommodate”\.

- Align – Existing processes fit in Orion/NetSuite as is\.
- Adapt – Pivot will change its processes to fit in Orion/NetSuite as is\.
- Accommodate – GSI will create a configuration specific to Pivot, or if the feature can benefit others, will update the code base to make the feature standard\.

## <a id="_Toc207966449"></a>__2\.05 Document Objectives__

The purpose of this document is to summarize functional and procedural requirements captured by GSI during the Discover business process mapping phase of the implementation\. 

This Business Requirements Document \(BRD\) documents your goals, the problems you want to solve, and the outcomes you expect\. It is the foundation for the setup of the system, acting as a __roadmap between your business needs and the solution design\.__

This document represents information gathered in meetings held with the Client, which enables the GSI team to map the business requirements to an efficient flow in the Orion/NetSuite application\. Once complete, this document will serve as a blueprint for the GSI team to configure the application\. This document does not supersede the Statement of Work\. The Statement of Work determines scope\. 

A series of process mapping discovery sessions, focusing on the key areas of the business, were used as a starting point for this exercise\. This document remains consistent in structure to those discovery sessions as it categorizes the findings into the same key process areas\. The set of business requirements documentation is inclusive of all business requirements provided by the Client 

# <a id="_Toc207966450"></a>__3 Pre\-Quote__

## <a id="_Toc207966451"></a>__3\.01 Request Management__

3\.01\.01 Your Business Requirements

1. Support 20\+ distinct request types including design requests, labor quote requests, customer approvals, proposal requests, and demo requests
2. Enable request engine configuration with conditional logic and automated routing based on request type, customer segment, and team assignments
3. Provide custom request type creation and management capabilities for specialized workflows \(GSA, storage agreements\)
4. Support request routing for both internal team assignments and external vendor coordination
5. Enable request template and field management with dynamic form behavior based on user responses
6. Implement request approval workflows and automated notifications for status changes and escalations
7. Maintain request status tracking and lifecycle management with complete audit trails

3\.01\.02 Current State Process

Pivot currently manages all pre\-quote requests through Adobe Workfront's "Issues" system, which serves as their comprehensive request management platform\. The system supports extensive request types including general requests, design double checks, labor quote requests \(both simple and complex\), customer approval workflows, bill backs, and various proposal types \(standard, GSA\-specific, leasing, third\-party billing, storage agreements\)\.

Salespeople initiate project requests through Workfront questionnaire systems that automatically assign project types based on answers, creating sophisticated workflows with conditional logic\. Request routing occurs through automated logic where IPMs receive complex projects while sales reps handle transactional work directly\. The system includes specialized workflows for demo requests requiring delivery coordination and quote bypass processes for specific order types \(WIX, ServiceNet, Delivery Upon Receipt \(DUR\), Quick Quotes, warranty claims\)\. This will be included in the requirement list\.

Key pain points include manual data transfer between Workfront, IQ Coordinator, and D365 for financial processing, heavy dependence on individual expertise \(particularly Sherri Nuzum's Workfront knowledge\), and the complexity of managing 20\+ request types that may include redundant variations creating training challenges for new team members\.

3\.01\.03 Orion/NetSuite Solution

Orion/NetSuite provides comprehensive request management capabilities specifically designed to eliminate the manual coordination and system fragmentation that currently challenges Pivot's operations\. The envisioned solution includes a configurable request engine that supports unlimited request types with sophisticated conditional logic, automated routing rules, and integrated approval workflows that have been successfully implemented across hundreds of commercial furniture dealerships\.

The platform's request engine configuration enables complex business rules through standard administration tools, supporting everything from simple general requests to sophisticated multi\-stage approval processes\. Request template and field management capabilities provide dynamic form behavior where fields appear based on previous responses, replicating Pivot's current Workfront questionnaire logic\. The solution's request routing functionality automatically assigns requests based on configurable criteria including customer segment, project complexity, and team member specialization\.

Request approval workflows and notification systems provide automated status tracking and escalation management, while request lifecycle management maintains complete audit trails for compliance and process improvement\. The integrated approach eliminates manual data transfer between systems by providing native integration between request management and downstream financial, project, and resource planning functions\.

3\.01\.04 Future State Process

After implementation, Pivot's request management will operate through Orion/NetSuite's unified request engine where salesp\. Oeople or other approved roles initiate requests through configurable forms that automatically capture all necessary information and route to appropriate team members based on business rules\. The system will support many of the current request types through streamlined categories with dropdown selections and replacement of current request types by tasks, eliminating the complexity of managing 20\+ separate forms while maintaining functionality\.

Additionally, those requests that were used to hand the baton from one department to the next will be handled naturally in the Orion/NetSuite system since all users will be working within one platform\. Things like transactions or record statuses will serve as natural handoffs to departments\.  Orion allows the initial assignment and reassignment of the labor quote request as needed\.

Request routing will allow for assigning of  PMs to complex projects based on salesperson alignment while directing transactional requests to sales coordinators\. Demo requests allows the  collection, delivery, and contact information while triggering fulfillment workflows, and specialized requests\.  Orion provides labor quote functionality for internal and external \(union\) labor\.

The integrated platform will provide real\-time visibility into request status, approval workflows, and process metrics while maintaining the sophisticated business logic Pivot has developed, but without the complexity of managing multiple systems and manual handoffs\.

 

*​​*Pivot currently uses 57 distinct issue types to create various types of requests in the following 10 categories: Design Related, Finance, General, Labor Quote, Order Entry, Other, Pre\-Sale, Proposal \(Quote\), Punch, and Service\.

The 57 distinct issue types are now mapped to 24 types in Orion\. 33 of the current distinct types map to an existing standard Orion process\.

__Issue Type__

__Action / Updated Mapping__

__DESIGN RELATED__

Design Double Check Request

UPDATED: Use single request record with type field driving sublist fields

Design Support Request \- External

UPDATED: Consolidated into single design support request record using type field

Design Support Request \- Internal

CONSOLIDATED: Combined with external support using type field

Design Production Support Request

CONSOLIDATED: Single design support request with type field

Design Fee per Design Contract Request

UPDATED: Integrate fee into main design request and capture as subtask

Design Sub Contract Contract Request

UPDATED: Quote record with custom PDF template

Design Sub Contract Support Request

Use PO system for subcontract work – needs additional discussion

Design Invoice Submittal

Standard Orion Process

__FINANCE__

Deposit Payment for Vendor

Add Vendor Prepayment Required record to PO

Request Credit Card Link for Customer

Vendor Setup for Customer

UPDATED: Design solution for automated vendor access provisioning

CAR Form/Credit Memo

Standard Orion Process

Standard Orion Process

Action Item \- General Request

Standard Orion Process & task follow\-up

UPDATED: Formal request engine instead of simple task approval

Standard Orion Process: quick quote functionality

NEEDS DISCUSSION: One person communicates with customer, another does work

## <a id="_Toc207966452"></a>__3\.02 Requirements Management__

3\.02\.01 Your Business Requirements

1. Enable requirement engine administration for configurable job site analysis fields and criteria
2. Support job site analysis record creation and management for tracking site\-specific requirements
3. Provide field collection capabilities for installation conditions \(elevators, parking, access restrictions\)
4. Enable requirements data integration with labor quote processes and project planning
5. Support mobile data collection for job site visits and analysis documentation

3\.02\.02 Current State Process

Pivot currently collects job site requirements through various manual processes depending on project complexity\. Information about elevators, parking availability, access restrictions, and installation conditions is gathered through project team visits and documented in various systems\. This data then feeds into labor quote processes where estimators must consider site\-specific factors in their calculations\.

The current process lacks standardization for requirements collection and often relies on informal communication between team members\. Job site analysis information may be captured in Workfront projects, email communications, or estimator notes, creating inconsistency in data quality and availability for quote accuracy\.

3\.02\.03 Orion/NetSuite Solution

Orion/NetSuite provides integrated requirements management through its requirement engine administration and job site analysis record functionality\. The solution enables standardized collection of job site requirements through configurable forms and mobile\-friendly interfaces that ensure consistent data capture across all projects\.

The requirements management capabilities integrate directly with labor quote processes, ensuring that site\-specific factors are automatically considered in estimation calculations\. Job site analysis records provide centralized storage for all site\-related information, accessible to estimators, project managers, and installation teams throughout the project lifecycle\.

3\.02\.04 Future State Process

Job site requirements will be collected through standardized Orion/NetSuite forms accessible on mobile devices during site visits\. Requirements data will automatically integrate with labor quote requests, ensuring estimators have complete site information for accurate calculations\. The centralized requirements repository will provide installation teams with comprehensive site analysis information for project planning and execution\.

3\.02\.05 Implementation Alignment \(Gap Analysis\)

![](data:image/x-emf;base64,)

__*Client Feedback*__

__*GSI Response*__

Will client badging requirements/vaccinations/etc\. be part of site conditions \(Sandra/Brian/Marie\)

Will this form be at the customer level or project? Ideally at the client address level, since jobsite conditions are fairly constant by address\. \(Sandra\) \+1 Brian

## <a id="_Toc207966453"></a>__3\.03 Project Initiation__

3\.03\.01 Your Business Requirements

1. Enable project record creation with automatic generation from opportunities following sales qualification
2. Provide Project Navigator tool functionality for comprehensive transaction linking across the project lifecycle
3. Support project definition and setup with automated team assignments and resource allocation
4. Implement Master Project and Related Projects capability for complex multi\-phase implementations
5. Enable seamless transition from opportunity management through project setup to quote creation

3\.03\.02 Current State Process

Pivot's project initiation currently occurs through Workfront with salespeople creating project requests through questionnaire systems\. Projects are automatically categorized based on responses, with IPMs assigned for complex projects while transactional work routes directly to sales coordinators\. The system provides project\-level visibility across all related orders and maintains umbrella project structure for comprehensive customer management\.

Project setup involves manual coordination between Workfront project creation and D365 financial setup, requiring sales coordinators to transfer project information for quote creation and customer financial dimension configuration\.

3\.03\.03 Orion/NetSuite Solution

Orion/NetSuite provides integrated project initiation through automatic project record creation from qualified opportunities, eliminating manual project setup processes\. The Project Navigator tool provides comprehensive transaction linking, enabling seamless visibility across the entire project lifecycle from initial opportunity through final delivery and invoicing\.

The platform's project definition and setup capabilities automatically configure team assignments, resource allocation, and financial dimensions based on opportunity characteristics\. Master Project and Related Projects functionality supports complex multi\-phase implementations while maintaining unified visibility and reporting across all project components

3\.03\.04 Future State Process

Project initiation will occur automatically when opportunities reach qualified status, creating project records with pre\-configured team assignments and resource allocations\. The Project Navigator will provide unified access to all project\-related transactions, from initial requests through final invoicing\. Master Project capabilities will enable complex project management while maintaining simplified user experience through integrated workflows\.

3\.03\.05 Implementation Alignment \(Gap Analysis\)

![](data:image/x-emf;base64,)

__*Client Feedback*__

__*GSI Response*__

Will we have the opportunity to manually trigger the project creation?  I’m thinking about our legacy clients, who send in purchase orders for us to order\.  We don’t have an opportunity for this as we weren’t expecting it\.  \(Sandra\)

How will RFPs be differentiated vs an opportunity/project? \(Yudi\)

Will smart numbering of Project/Quote/Sales Order/Purchase Order be implemented? \(Sandra\)

The BRD states resources will automatically be assigned, how is this handled on accounts that do not have automatic alignment or may have a few different workers to choose from \(that are leader assigned\) \- Brian

## <a id="_Toc207966454"></a>__3\.04 Design Management__

3\.04\.01 Your Business Requirements

1. Implement Orion Kanban Boards \(Design Board\) for visual workflow management and project status tracking
2. Enable design request assignment and tracking with automated routing to appropriate designers
3. Provide designer workload and capacity management reporting with 80% utilization target tracking
4. Support design request task management for quality processes including double\-check workflows and markup logs
5. Integrate design time tracking with job costing and project profitability analysis

3\.04\.02 Current State Process

Pivot tracks design capacity through Workfront time tracking with an 80% utilization target, supported by Power BI reporting that blends data from multiple systems\. Users \(Design Studio Leads\) manage all design assignments based on both capacity availability and project\-specific skill requirements, with assignment decisions occurring at the request level\.

Design double\-check processes involve detailed markup logs that track error types and quality metrics, providing valuable reporting data but requiring manual form completion and coordination\. The current system requires manual coordination between Workfront time entries and Power BI reporting for complete visibility into designer utilization and project profitability\.

3\.04\.03 Orion/NetSuite Solution

Orion/NetSuite provides integrated design management through Orion Kanban Boards that deliver visual workflow management specifically designed for design team coordination\. The Design Board functionality enables real\-time project status tracking and provides comprehensive visibility into all active design work across the organization\.

Designer workload and capacity management reporting provides real\-time utilization tracking against configurable targets \(80% for Pivot\), eliminating the need for external BI tools\. Design request task management supports sophisticated quality processes including double\-check workflows, markup logs, and automated quality reporting integrated directly with project management and time tracking systems\.

Design time tracking integrates natively with job costing and project profitability analysis, ensuring accurate resource allocation and project financial management without manual data transfer between systems\.

3\.04\.04 Future State Process

Design workflow management will operate through integrated Orion Kanban Boards where users can view real\-time designer capacity, current project assignments, and design request queues in visual workflow displays\. Assignment decisions will be supported by automatic capacity calculations and project expertise matching while maintaining human oversight for optimal quality outcomes\.

Design time tracking will occur directly within project contexts, automatically feeding utilization reporting and job costing calculations\. Design double\-check workflows will integrate file collaboration, markup logging, and quality reporting within the project task management system, providing seamless handoffs and comprehensive audit trails\.

3\.04\.05 Implementation Alignment \(Gap Analysis

![](data:image/x-emf;base64,)

__*Client Feedback*__

__*GSI Response*__

Change of who assigns design resources to design leadership \- Brian

## <a id="_Toc207966455"></a>__3\.05 Team & Assignment Management__

3\.05\.01 Your Business Requirements

1. Implement Order Team Management \(People Assignment Utility\) for automated team assignments across projects
2. Enable team management by Sales Person maintaining current PM \(including IPM\) \-salesperson alignment relationships
3. Support role\-based assignments and responsibilities with automated routing and override capabilities
4. Provide influencer and stakeholder management for complex project communication coordination
5. Enable customer contact assignment and management for consistent communication and relationship continuity
6. Implement competitor tracking capabilities for strategic account management and competitive analysis

3\.05\.02 Current State Process

Pivot uses a sophisticated hybrid team assignment approach where Implementation Project Managers \(IPMs\) are aligned to specific salespeople and handle their complex projects, while users manage all design resource assignments regardless of salesperson alignment\. This creates a matrix organization that optimizes both customer relationship continuity and resource utilization\.

Project creation triggers IPM assignment based on salesperson alignment and project complexity, with sales coordinators handling simple transactional projects without IPM involvement\. The current system provides project\-level team visibility across the entire lifecycle from request through completion but requires manual coordination to maintain team assignments and resource balancing\.

3\.05\.03 Orion/NetSuite Solution

Orion/NetSuite provides comprehensive team and assignment management through the Order Team Management \(People Assignment Utility\) that supports sophisticated resource allocation models used by professional services organizations\. The solution enables automated team assignments while maintaining flexibility for manual adjustments and exception handling that Pivot requires\.

Team management by Sales Person functionality preserves current IPM\-salesperson relationships while providing capacity\-aware assignment recommendations for optimal resource utilization\. Role\-based assignments and responsibilities ensure appropriate skill matching and workload distribution, while influencer and customer contact assignment capabilities support complex project communication coordination\.

Sales rep and team assignment functionality includes automated workload balancing alerts and competitor tracking capabilities that enhance strategic account management and competitive positioning efforts\.

3\.05\.04 Future State Process

Team assignments will occur automatically through Order Team Management rules that maintain IPM\-salesperson relationships while enabling user optimization of design resources\. The system will provide cross\-functional visibility into team assignments and project status through integrated dashboards that eliminate manual coordination requirements\.

Customer contact assignments will ensure communication continuity while competitor tracking will provide strategic insights into account management and competitive positioning\. Resource utilization alerts will trigger automatically when team members approach capacity thresholds, enabling proactive workload balancing\.

3\.05\.05 Implementation Alignment \(Gap Analysis\)

![](data:image/x-emf;base64,)

__*Client Feedback*__

__*GSI Response*__

<a id="_Toc207966456"></a>

## __3\.06 Financial Setup & Management__

3\.06\.01 Your Business Requirements

1. Explore customer approval workflows and tracking with automated D&B credit integration that may be available in ezyCollect\.
2. Enable invoice schedules and template configuration for flexible billing arrangements and project\-based invoicing
3. Support payment terms configuration and management with automated assignment based on customer credit profiles
4. Provide unearned revenue management for prepayments with automated application at project completion
5. Maintain financial audit trails and compliance reporting for all approval and payment processing activities

3\.06\.02 Current State Process

Pivot's customer approval process currently defaults new customers to 100% prepayment terms, with D&B credit checks performed by the accounting team and credit applications processed early in the sales cycle\. FluidPay handles credit card processing with fee pass\-through capabilities, but the system is described as "basic but functional" with limited integration to D365\.

Prepayments are treated as unearned revenue and applied at project completion, requiring manual coordination between payment processing and project financial management\. Customer financial dimension setup requires manual coordination between sales, accounting, and operations teams to establish customer segmentation aligned with salesperson territories\.

3\.06\.03 Orion/NetSuite Solution

Orion/NetSuite provides comprehensive financial setup and management\. Invoice schedules and template configuration enable flexible project\-based billing arrangements while maintaining compliance with revenue recognition requirements\.

Payment terms configuration and management capabilities automatically assign appropriate terms based on customer credit evaluation results while maintaining default 100% prepayment for new customers until credit approval\. The solution's unearned revenue management handles prepayment processing and automatic application at project completion without manual intervention\.

Enhanced payment processing capabilities exceed current FluidPay functionality through multiple gateway options with superior fee pass\-through capabilities, automated payment link generation, and comprehensive integration with invoicing and revenue recognition processes\.

3\.06\.04 Future State Process

Customer approval workflows will initiate automatically upon new customer creation\.

Invoice scheduling will operate through automated templates that handle project\-based billing arrangements, while unearned revenue management ensures accurate financial reporting through automated prepayment application processes\.

3\.06\.05 Implementation Alignment \(Gap Analysis\)

![](data:image/x-emf;base64,)

__*Client Feedback*__

__*GSI Response*__

Will a “New Customer Application” form be possible, to send from Orion \(similar to the quote approval process\)?  \(Sandra\)
